vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

fragment_roles: rows where target_num > 75 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: ("status" = 'available' OR ("status" = 'deleting' OR ("status" = 'error_deleting' OR ("status" = 'creating' OR ("status" = 'error' OR "status" IS NULL)))))
fragment_roles: rows where status = available + rows where status = deleting + rows where status = error_deleting + rows where status = creating + rows where status = error or is NULL
snapshots||vfrag=cgsnapshot_id_2.fragment_role_B: rows where status = available + rows where status = deleting + rows where status = error_deleting + rows where status = creating + rows where status = error or is NULL

fragment_roles: rows where value = False + rows where value = ro + rows where value = True or is NULL
volume_admin_metadata||vfrag=created_at.fragment_role_B: rows where value = False + rows where value = ro + rows where value = True or is NULL

fragment_roles: rows where created_at > 2020-10-21 20:47:37 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: ("value" = 'vortex4-37' OR ("value" = 'omni-align-star' OR (("value" = 'helio' OR "value" = 'twist3-5') OR (("value" = 'omega' OR "value" = 'comet5-92') OR ("value" = 'array9-48' OR "value" = 'aurum-82')))))
fragment_roles: rows where value = vortex4-37 + rows where value = omni-align-star + rows where value = helio + rows where value = twist3-5 + rows where value = omega + rows where value = comet5-92 + rows where value = array9-48 + rows where value = aurum-82
rows where value is NULL or not in {'flare2-55', 'vortex4-37', 'omni-align-star', 'helio', 'twist3-5', 'omega', 'array9-48', 'aurum-82', 'comet5-92'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
volume_metadata||vfrag=deleted.fragment_role_B: rows where value = vortex4-37 + rows where value = omni-align-star + rows where value = helio + rows where value = twist3-5 + rows where value = omega + rows where value = comet5-92 + rows where value = array9-48 + rows where value = aurum-82

fragment_roles: rows where attach_status = attached or is NULL
volumes||vfrag=attach_status.fragment_role_B: rows where attach_status = attached or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: (("delta" IS NOT NULL AND "delta" > 1 AND "delta" <= 10) OR ("delta" > 10 OR "delta" IS NULL))
fragment_roles: rows where 1 < delta <= 10 + rows where delta > 10 or is NULL

rows where instance_uuid = 0b1e3819-6250-479d-9247-549549fcb712 + rows where instance_uuid = 501e65b0-b58f-4e7f-b015-30777efd0f31 + rows where instance_uuid = c1852e78-3fbe-4cab-bb45-6712f15de351 + rows where instance_uuid = 3a428bb4-d4c2-4bd7-9433-b4b7a7ba9735 + rows where instance_uuid = b78f7192-68f4-4cc1-a6a1-6a66692b612b + rows where instance_uuid = 9ae08f45-31c6-45c3-8210-b04eda517375
rows where created_at > 2019-10-29 19:57:22 or is NULL
rows where created_at > 2020-04-30 14:22:01 or is NULL

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
